title: Use of sensitive health information for targeting of Google ads raises privacy concerns
summary: See also: News Release – Google ads sparked by web surfing on health sites violate privacy rights, investigation finds Following the release of the Report of Findings, our Office received an update from Google outlining the remedial measures put in place and we are satisfied that Google has addressed our recommendations.
dedupKey: use of sensitive health information for targeting of google ads raises privacy concerns|2014-01-14
